cleavage agent: first digested for 4 h at 37 °C with Lys-C (enzyme/substrate ratio 1:100)
enrichment method: phosphopeptide enrichment using Ti4+-IMAC material as described previously
instrument: coupled to an Orbitrap Elite (Thermo, San Jose, CA)
ionization type: connected to the mass spectrometer through a nanoelectrospray ion source
labeling: the resulting peptides were chemically labeled using stable isotope dimethyl labeling
reduction reagent: using a final concentration of 2 mM dithiothreitol
reduction concentration: using a final concentration of 2 mM dithiothreitol
